title: Modeling Catastrophic Risks from Advanced AI
location: The Yard, 156 2nd St, San Francisco, CA
speaker: Eliot Kreuger
description: We'll explore how we model and reason about catastrophic risks from advanced AI systems. Topics include threat modeling frameworks, uncertainty, and decision-making under deep uncertainty.

title: Vibestemics: Designing Better Online Communities
speaker: Mira Shah
description: A practical salon on social technology, trust loops, and the small design choices that help communities become more thoughtful over time.

title: Frontier Models: Where Scaling Meets Reasoning
speaker: Noah Vale
description: A technical talk on the changing relationship between scale, reasoning, tool use, and evaluation in frontier model development.

title: AI Safety Journal Club
speaker: Ada Lin
description: A close read of recent papers in alignment, oversight, and evals, followed by structured discussion over lunch.

title: Social Technology and Coordination Problems
speaker: Theo Park
description: A discussion of mechanisms, rituals, and lightweight institutions that help groups coordinate without losing texture or agency.

title: Research Lightning Talks
speaker: Mox Fellows
description: Short, high-signal presentations from researchers working across AI safety, cognition, governance, and community design.

title: Cause Prioritization Workshop
speaker: Jon Bell
description: A hands-on workshop for comparing problems, assumptions, neglectedness, tractability, and personal fit.

title: Save the date - to be announced
speaker: To be announced
description: We're holding this spot on the calendar. Speaker and topic coming soon - check back, or add the season calendar so it lands in yours automatically.

title: Mox Summer Social
speaker: Mox Community
description: An open social for the season: new friends, old collaborators, and a room full of people who like unusually good questions.

title: The Long View: Futures Worth Building
speaker: Leah Morgan
description: A talk on positive visions, civilizational steering, and the discipline of making long-term thinking concrete enough to build with.

title: Save the date - to be announced
speaker: To be announced
description: We're holding this spot on the calendar. Speaker and topic coming soon - check back, or add the season calendar so it lands in yours automatically.

title: Season Wrap: Ideas, Reflections, and What's Next
speaker: Mox Team
description: A closing session to reflect on the season, trade notes, and turn promising conversations into next steps.
